emails.subject: Guaranty Amount for TBS
emails.body: Guaranty Amount for TBS Nasim- Did you ever find out what dollar amount should be on the Enron Corp. guaranty? We have the documentation ready so, once we know the guaranty amount we can have it executed. Regards, Pat Cini x5-7130

emails.subject: Guaranty Amount for TBS
emails.body: Guaranty Amount for TBS Nasim- Did you ever find out what dollar amount should be on the Enron Corp. guaranty? We have the documentation ready so, once we know the guaranty amount we can have it executed. Regards, Pat Cini x5-7130

emails.subject: Re: Guaranty Amount for TBS
emails.body: Re: Guaranty Amount for TBS Pat: We would like to review the document before it is executed. I would provide the amount as part of our review process. Nasim
